title: Youtube Poop Trailer:  The Godfather
description:
Forget about it....
Zelda CD-i and Super Mario World T.V. show used as video sources 
NOTE:  This video was previously taken down due to copyright.  To clear things up, I do not own any of the music in this video.  It is from the movie The Godfather (obviously).  And remember.... don't insult the King.
